'''Emet''' was actually a captured rogue [[Planetoid/Legends|planetoid]] but was counted as the first orbiting body in the [[Genesia system/Legends|Genesia system]]. Its wandering orbit would eventually cause it to fall into the system's [[Genesia (star)|sun]].
